title: Darker Diamonds
description: Diamonds are now a shade of dark blue instead of the usual light blue
body:
Diamonds are now a shade of dark blue instead of the usual light blue.
Meant for 1.14-1.21, still usable in older versions

**Changes**

- Diamond
- Diamond Block
- Diamond Tools + Sword
- Diamond Armor
- Diamond Horse Armor
- Diamond Ore
- Deepslate Diamond Ore
- Enchantment Table
- Armor Trims
- Armor Trim Templates
- Netherite Upgrade Template
- Vanilla Tweaks Diminishing Tools

Works with [Vanilla Tweaks](https://vanillatweaks.net/picker/resource-packs/) Diminishing Tools!
(Put the Darker Diamonds Pack Above The Vanilla Tweaks Pack)
